title: Fee calculation and note selection for shielded tx
description: Implement coin selection: select_notes(available: &[Note], target_zatoshi: u64, fee: u64) -> Result<Vec<Note>>. Must select the minimum number of notes whose sum covers target + fee, preferring older notes first (FIFO) to minimize witness depth. Fee must use ZIP-317 conventional fee: max(MARGINAL_FEE * (inputs + outputs), GRACE_ACTIONS * MARGINAL_FEE). Use a subagent to look up current ZIP-317 MARGINAL_FEE and GRACE_ACTIONS constants from the zip317 crate or zcash spec. Defensive programming: if no combination of notes covers the amount, return Err(InsufficientFunds) with exact shortfall; never panic on empty note list; log note count selected (not amounts); add an assertion that sum(selected_notes) >= target + fee before returning.
acceptance_criteria: Property test (proptest or quickcheck): for random note sets where sum >= target+fee, selection always succeeds. Test: exact amount (sum == target+fee) works. Test: sum < target+fee returns Err. Test: fee matches ZIP-317 formula for varying input/output counts.
